diagrams.title: Binary Tree Terminology
diagrams.description: Shows a sample binary tree with labeled parts: root, parent, child, leaf, level, height
diagrams.purpose: Learn and visualize basic tree terminology and structure

diagrams.title: Types of Binary Trees
diagrams.description: Compares full, complete, and perfect binary trees side by side
elements: Full tree: nodes have 0 or 2 children
Complete tree: levels filled left to right
Perfect tree: all levels full, all leaves same level
diagrams.purpose: Differentiate between the three important types of binary trees

diagrams.title: Tree Traversals Visualized
diagrams.description: Shows step-by-step traversal paths for preorder, inorder, and postorder on same tree
elements: Numbered sequence for each traversal type
diagrams.purpose: Understand the difference between traversal methods visually

diagrams.title: BST Insertion Example
diagrams.description: Demonstrates building a BST by inserting numbers step by step
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how BST is constructed from a sequence of numbers
